spacing_and_layout.spacing_system: Generous spacing. p-6 or p-8 inside cards to avoid collision. py-20, py-24, or py-32 for marketing sections.
spacing_and_layout.marketing_pages: Bento grids, overlapping elements. Use Mode A (Tetris Grid) with gap-8 to gap-12.
spacing_and_layout.dashboards: Mode B (Control Room Grid). Strict hierarchy, grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-4 or gap-6. Direct children strictly for grid items.

components_instructions.general: Use Shadcn components for forms, inputs, selects, dialogs. Never use native select/input.
components_instructions.cards: Subtle border (1px solid #E2E8F0), flat background. Hover: shadow-lg -translate-y-1. Do not overuse cards.
components_instructions.buttons: CTA primary must be Gold (#D4AF37) with Navy Blue text for contrast, or Navy Blue (#0B1F3A) with White text. Hover state must have explicit text color. Ensure 3:1 contrast ratio.
components_instructions.navigation: Header must have z-50. Do not use transparent background. Use glassmorphism or solid white/gray.
components_instructions.data_test_id: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Required on all interactive elements. Explicitly set text color on hover.

icons.instructions: Use lucide-react for all standard icons.

instructions_to_main_agent: Design a premium, industrial-feeling app for JDOM Universal Concept Ltd using Navy Blue (#0B1F3A) and Gold (#D4AF37).
Marketing pages (Home, About, Resources) should use large typography, bento grids, and high-impact hero sections. Dark overlay for hero text readability is critical.
Dashboard must be built with an intense focus on scanability. Navy Blue sidebar, white background for main area.
Include 'data-testid' attributes on all CTA buttons, form inputs, and links.
Do NOT use HTML native inputs. Use Shadcn components for forms.
Do NOT center align text in paragraphs. Use left-alignment for dense content.
Follow contrast accessibility standards for Gold text/buttons on Light and Dark backgrounds. When gold button is used, use navy text. When navy button is used, use white text.
